scripts.deploy:web: /usr/local/bin/docker compose build sori-web && /usr/local/bin/docker compose up -d sori-web
scripts.deploy:backend: SORI_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf unknown); SORI_BUILD_ID=$SORI_COMMIT; export SORI_COMMIT SORI_BUILD_ID; /usr/local/bin/docker compose build sori-backend && /usr/local/bin/docker compose up -d sori-backend
scripts.deploy:all: SORI_COMMIT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf unknown); SORI_BUILD_ID=$SORI_COMMIT; export SORI_COMMIT SORI_BUILD_ID; /usr/local/bin/docker compose build && /usr/local/bin/docker compose up -d
